summary: Add the M4 AI provider request foundation: a direct fetch client with provider-specific request and response envelopes, abort propagation, and secret-safe error redaction.

decisions.decision: Use a small application-owned fetch client with explicit OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, and local Ollama-style envelopes instead of an SDK or hidden provider abstraction.
decisions.rationale: The client must preserve clean-room ownership, make wire behavior testable, and keep provider secrets inside the request boundary.

decisions.decision: A missing provider or missing secret fails before fetch; any transport error is redacted for bearer and sk-style secret tokens; AbortSignal is passed through unchanged.
decisions.rationale: AC-10.a requires zero network calls until configured, and N-7 forbids claiming safe secret handling without a checked boundary.

testEvidence.criterion: The provider client tests fail when the implementation is absent and pass for all supported response envelopes.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused provider-client suite once against the deliberate missing-module RED state, then against the implementation.

red.outcome: RED: Test Files 1 failed; module ../../../src/application/ai/ai-client was not found; exit 1.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 7 passed (7); Duration 456ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The complete TypeScript, lint/source-policy, and provenance checks remain clean.
testEvidence.test: Run the repository type, lint, and provenance gates once after implementation.

red.outcome: RED: with the provider modules deliberately removed, TypeScript reported TS2307 for the ai-client import and exited 2.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd check:provenance
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 417 files in 226ms with source policy passed; provenance ledger passed validation.

questions: C10-B is only the non-streaming provider request foundation. SSE/streaming presentation, conversation reducer, reviewable code actions, persistence, context budgets, and agent-loop caps remain later M4 units; no C10 completion claim is made.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
